gist.headline: CatGPT enters the chat
gist.blurb: Someone built a CatGPT Discord bot that turns your messages into sarcastic webcomics. It even uses your avatar, so you can be personally roasted by a fictional cat in high resolution.
gist.summary: Added a CatGPT Discord bot to the apps directory that uses Claude for witty replies and nanobanana to generate custom webcomic panels.
gist.impact: Discord users can now trigger custom AI-generated comic strips that feature their own avatars interacting with a sassy AI cat.
gist.visual_concept: A sassy cat and the Pollinations bee mascot. The cat represents the new CatGPT bot, and comic strips represent the generated webcomics. They should be hanging out around a retro computer or chat interface.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny beret, laughing at a printed comic strip alongside a sassy, chunky pixel art cat sitting on a retro computer monitor. The monitor screen glows with chat bubbles. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
